patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.changes: Removed the Wolf Sledge, Telos Boltace, Zenith, Tatsu, Tatsu Prime, and Staticor from Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed tilted position of the Telos Boltace when holstered on Mesa’s back.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.8.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Telos Boltace Stormpath ability not working with the Maruta Tonfa Skin equipped.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.4.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Telos Boltace pull not working for Clients.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Telos Boltace spin attack slowing down the user and allies.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the initial spin attack pull of the Telos Boltace pulling enemies through the Rift.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.4
patchlogs.changes:
Increased the time between Telos Boltace’s slides from 6 to 8 seconds. This means after doing first slide attack you now have 8 seconds to do the next slide that does the radial blast+damage.
Added 100 Impact damage to the Telos Boltace Stormpath attack.
Added 20 Impact damage to the Stormpath attack of the Telos Boltace in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Telos Boltace not functioning properly with Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors.
Fixed other player Telos Boltace Stormpaths overriding your own vortex/blast timing.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Updated the Telos Boltace description to match its new mechanics introduced in Update 20.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Telos Boltace’s mechanics not functioning after using/being revived.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
The only melee entry on the list is the Telos Boltace.
Reduced particles from the Telos Boltace slide attack as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/764794-balance-the-telos-boltace/?page=2#comment-8431700
patchlogs.fixes:
Adjusted positioning for several Sugatras attachments on the Boltace to prevent them from clipping and jittering around.
Fixed an issue with Telos Boltace appearing incorrectly when equipped on Mesa.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Hydroid’s passive activating off of the Telos Boltace spin attack and from an equipped Bullet Dance.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: The Telos Boltace must now be equipped to receive the spin attack benefit.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U2
patchlogs.additions: Represent your favorite Syndicate with these unique entry of weapons. Each weapon is charged with a unique bonus (brainstormed by your Design Council!) and reflect the Syndicates they represent. These weapons have stat changes and a unique passive, but there is no Syndicate burst associated with them. Diversity! All weapons must be equipped in melee mode to benefit from the bonus (save for the Telos Boltace).

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2
patchlogs.changes: Kronen and Boltace damage has been decreased in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.changes: • Reduced the damage of the Boltace in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.5: Tubemen Of Regor
patchlogs.fixes:
Boltace Tonfa, Daikyu Bow and Atomos Particle Cannon available now!
Tenno, master three new additions to the Warframe Arsenal! Equip the Boltace tonfa, Daikyu bow or Atomos particle cannon to bring destruction to the enemy.
